title: Multicam scenario: recover the true offset between two cameras (ground truth 3.7s)
prompt: media/camA.mp4 and media/camB.mp4 are two cameras rolling on the same wedding speech, started at different times. Determine how many seconds after camA's start camB begins - i.e. the number to add to a camB timestamp to land on the same moment in camA. Write answer.json as {"offset": <seconds>}. Do not render anything. A `ripple` CLI is available on PATH - run `ripple help` first.
setup: ffmpeg -y -v error -ss 3.7 -i $CACHE/married.mp4 -vf scale=640:-2 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -crf 24 -c:a aac media/camB.mp4
